root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

data_date.text: หุ้น หนี้ ณ วันที่

book_date.text: ให้ไว้ ณ วันที่

root.sql:
select trim(sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name)||' '||'ขอรับรองว่า'||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as paragraph_1 , ' เป็นสมาชิก'||trim(sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name)||' เลขทะเบียนสมาชิก '||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)||' สังกัด' as paragraph_2 , trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no))||' ณ วันที่ '|| trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','SD MONTH YYYY'))||' มีหุ้น '|| REPLACE(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )/sc_share_m_constant.share_value_perunit)::bigint), RIGHT(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )/sc_share_m_constant.share_value_perunit)::bigint),3),null)|| ' หุ้น เป็นเงิน '||REPLACE(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ))::bigint), RIGHT(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ))::bigint),3),null)||' บาท' as paragraph_3 , ' ('||(pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,'!data_date!' ))::double precision)||') และมีหนี้สินผูกพันกับสหกรณ์ จำนวน ') as paragraph_4 , (to_snumber(((select coalesce(sum(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!data_date!' )),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ))::bigint))|| ' บาท ('||(select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sum(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!data_date!' )))::double precision) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no )||')' as paragraph_5 , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!'as data_date , '!book_no!'as book_no , '!book_date!'as book_date , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_share_m_constant where 1=1 and pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ) > 0 and ((select coalesce(sum(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!data_date!' )),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) > 0) --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '050000' /*WHERE*/
